welcome.title: Welcome to Loopboard
welcome.body: Loopboard helps you run your job search like a CRM: create search directions, find matching vacancies, turn matches into applications, and track the whole process to the result. Everything follows one logic: search direction → match → application → next step.

loops.title: Start with a search direction
loops.body: A search direction is your filter and strategy. For example: Frontend Developer, IT Sales Manager, or CRM Consultant. Inside a direction you can choose sources, keywords, city, radius, and work format. The more precise the direction, the cleaner the matches.

matches.title: Review the matches you find
matches.body: Matches are vacancies the system found for your search directions. Here you compare options, look at the Match Score, the source, and vacancy details, and decide whether to turn a vacancy into an application. The Match Score is calculated by the system — use it as a hint, not as the final decision.

applications.title: Turn good vacancies into applications
applications.body: When a vacancy fits, create an application from it. An application is your real process: company, role, status, contact, notes, and next actions. The point is not just to save vacancies, but to manage them like clients in a CRM.

board.title: Manage applications on the board
board.body: The board shows your applications by stage: active, interview, offer, rejected, or no response. It helps you quickly see where you stand, what needs attention, and which applications to move forward. Moving a card changes the application's status.

calendar.title: Plan your next actions
calendar.body: In the future, Loopboard will help you plan actions for your applications: a call at 10:00, a follow-up tomorrow, an interview, a test-task deadline, or a reminder to check a status. The calendar should be tied to applications, not create random events.

finish.title: You're ready to start
finish.body: Create your first search direction, review the matches, and turn the best vacancies into applications. Work by the system: less chaos, more control, and a clear next step for every opportunity.
